framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折)

physical_observables.description: 每天必须更新的三个物理量。告诉你'现在什么状态'

history.note: Day 10, still high
Day 13, IRGC 'most intense operation'
Day 14, IRGC fighters direct engagement
Day 17, TBD

Day 18. US struck 5000+ targets total. Kharg Island precision strike (Mar 14) destroyed 90+ targets. Iran navy 'crushed' per CENTCOM. 20+ weapons systems deployed. IRGC still active but degraded capacity. US casualties 13 total (7 by enemy fire, 6 in Kuwait drone strike). Amnesty reports unlawful school strike killing 100+ children (Mar 17). AJE live tracker: 1,444 dead Iran (state media), 2,000+ cross-region.

Day 18 late. Attack pattern QUALITATIVE SHIFT: (1) Iran fired Sejjil ballistic missile at Israel (first time in war — new weapon system); (2) Iraqi militia drones+rockets hit US embassy Baghdad + luxury hotel in Green Zone + Iraqi oil field; (3) ISW: 'Iranian-backed Iraqi militias continue to attack US forces and interests in Iraq'; (4) CENTCOM confirmed 20+ weapon systems across air/sea/land. Pattern: IRGC direct attacks declining in frequency but PROXY attacks escalating (Iraq militia) + STRATEGIC weapons (Sejjil BM) being deployed. Degraded but adapting, not collapsing.

Day 19. ★ KEY: ISW Mar 16 report confirms 'Iran has not attacked any vessels in the Strait of Hormuz since March 12' — 5+ days without vessel attacks. US F/A-18 engaging targets at extremely low altitude in Chabahar suggests US local air dominance along coast segments. CENTCOM struck multiple Iranian air defense systems (Mar 16 footage). Larijani (SNSC sec-gen) + Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani killed by Israel. Mojtaba inner circle now dominated by hardline IRGC commanders (Taeb, Vahidi, Jafari, Ghalibaf, Rezaei per NYT). Regime restricting internet further (Starlink crackdown, VPN reduction). IRGC direct vessel attack frequency at war low BUT proxy attacks via Iraq militia continue. Hezbollah planning major rocket fire at Israel per IDF. Pattern: IRGC maritime capability significantly degraded, shifting to proxy + strategic weapons.

Day 19 update. No new kinetic data since last check. ISW vessel attack lull now 6 days (since Mar 12). Pentagon presenting Trump daily options to end war — none taken yet (NBC). Araghchi: 'We did not request a ceasefire, but this war must end in a way that it will not be repeated' (NBC/Fars). CENTCOM 5000+ targets struck total. First 6 days cost $11.3B per Pentagon report to Congress. Pattern unchanged: IRGC maritime degraded, proxy vector (Iraq militia) active, strategic weapons (Sejjil BM) deployed.

Day 19 11:00. P0: Iran CONFIRMED renewed missile+drone attacks on Gulf Arabs+Israel (The Hindu Mar 18). Larijani death CONFIRMED by Iran. IDF vows to hunt Mojtaba. USS Ford pulling into port. CENTCOM bunker busters near Hormuz.

Day 19 pipeline. P0 ESCALATION: Iran announced COORDINATED offensive by IRGC Navy + Iranian Army + Hezbollah against Israel and US bases. This BREAKS the 6-day vessel attack lull pattern. (1) 58 hospitalized in Israel from missile strike; (2) Hezbollah+Iran cluster munitions on Haifa area; (3) Iran again targeted Gulf countries with missiles+drones; (4) USS Ford pulling into port after fire (laundry area, 2 sailors injured) — reduced US carrier capability; (5) CENTCOM bunker busters near Hormuz (Mar 17). Qualitative shift: from degraded/adapting to COORDINATED MULTI-FRONT OFFENSIVE. Central command still functioning despite tactical decentralization. AJE death toll: 1,444 Iran (state media), 15+ Israel, 13 US, 20+ Gulf states.

Day 19 evening pipeline. COORDINATED OFFENSIVE CONFIRMED multi-source: (1) Iran coordinated offensive by IRGC Navy + Army + Hezbollah (Wikipedia); (2) Tel Aviv missile barrage — 2 killed, 58 hospitalized (Dawn/AFP); (3) Cluster munitions on Haifa area (Wikipedia/Lebanon war page); (4) Gulf countries targeted again with missiles/drones, oil prices rising (Wikipedia); (5) Iranian projectile near Australian Al Minhad Air Base UAE (LiveMint); (6) CENTCOM 5000-lb bunker busters on hardened SSM sites along Iran coast near Hormuz (TimesNow/CENTCOM); (7) USS Ford pulling into port = reduced carrier capability; (8) CENTCOM confirmed 20+ weapon systems across air/sea/land; (9) F/A-18 engaging at extremely low altitude near Chabahar. Pattern: 6-day vessel attack lull BROKEN. Iran choosing to spend remaining strategic reserves on coordinated multi-front offensive rather than slow attrition. This is a use-it-or-lose-it calculus.

Day 19 late. 🔴 ENERGY RUBICON CROSSED: (1) Israel/US coordinated strike on SOUTH PARS gas field (world's largest, shared w/ Qatar) + Asaluyeh oil facilities (Bloomberg/NYT/JPost/AJE/Guardian/Reuters); (2) Israel killed Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib — 3rd top official in 48hrs (AP/NYT/CNN); (3) Iran IRGC issued SPECIFIC evacuation orders for Gulf energy targets: Saudi Samref+Jubail, UAE Al Hosn, Qatar Mesaieed+Ras Laffan (Reuters); (4) Aramco evacuating Samref personnel (OilPrice); (5) Mojtaba REJECTED de-escalation — demands US/Israel 'brought to their knees' (Reuters/SMH/CNA); (6) Mossad ground op inside Iran (Al Arabiya single source); (7) Iran using Russian-modified Shaheds (ISW). Pattern: WAR PHASE CHANGE — from military-to-military combat to ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE WAR. The 3-week tacit truce on energy targets is BROKEN. Iran listing specific Saudi/UAE/Qatar facilities = war may expand from US-Iran to REGIONAL ENERGY CONFLICT.

Day 20 (entering). ENERGY WAR PHASE CONFIRMED MULTI-SOURCE: (1) Israel/US struck South Pars gas field (world largest, shared w/ Qatar) — Bloomberg/NYT/AP/CNN/AJE/Guardian all confirm; (2) Asaluyeh oil facilities also hit; (3) Intelligence Minister Khatib killed by Israel — 4th top official eliminated; (4) IRGC coordinated offensive by Navy + Army + Hezbollah continues; (5) CENTCOM: 7,000+ targets struck (up from 5,000+); (6) Gulf states (Kuwait/Qatar/Saudi/UAE) intercepting missiles and drones daily; (7) Iran using Russian-modified Shahed drones (ISW); (8) Euronews: barrages targeting Gulf region daily; (9) Amnesty: CENTCOM using AI tools for targeting; (10) Turkish Airlines cancelled all regional flights until Mar 19-20. QUALITATIVE ASSESSMENT: War has entered ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE PHASE. The 3-week tacit truce on energy targets is broken. Both sides now hitting each other economic lifelines. This is the most significant escalation since the war began.

Day 20. 🔴 P0 — ENERGY WAR RETALIATION EXECUTED: (1) Iran STRUCK Ras Laffan Industrial City (Qatar) with missiles — 'extensive damage' confirmed by QatarEnergy (CNBC/AJE/Reuters). World's LARGEST LNG export hub. No casualties reported but infrastructure damage confirmed; (2) Saudi Arabia intercepted 4 ballistic missiles targeting RIYADH (Guardian); (3) UAE intercepted 13 ballistic missiles + 27 drones from Iran, shut gas facilities (AJE); (4) IRGC statement: enemies should 'await the powerful action' of armed forces after South Pars attack (CNN/Newsweek); (5) CENTCOM: 7,000+ targets struck total (AJE); (6) Pentagon reportedly requesting $200B in war funds (Guardian); (7) Dow -750pts, S&P -1.3% on Mar 18 after Fed decision + war escalation (Yahoo Finance); (8) ISW Mar 18: IRGC Navy ammo depot Bushehr + Bandar-e Jask port struck; (9) Araghchi firmly rejects ceasefire (Time). QUALITATIVE ASSESSMENT: War has crossed from ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE threats to KINETIC ENERGY WAR across Gulf. Iran's IRGC evacuation warnings (Mar 17) for Saudi/UAE/Qatar targets were NOT rhetoric — they were operational targeting notices. The 3-week tacit truce on energy infrastructure is irrevocably broken on BOTH sides. This is the most dangerous escalation since the war began — a full regional energy war is now underway.

Day 20 evening. 🔴 P0 — ENERGY WAR + DIPLOMATIC BREAK: (1) Iran fired 8+ barrages at Israel since midnight Mar 19 (ToI liveblog); (2) Cluster munitions on Ramat Gan — 2 killed in 70s found outside safe room (Wikipedia/AP); (3) Iran retaliatory offensive continues: IRGC Navy + Army + Hezbollah coordinated; (4) ★ DIPLOMATIC RUPTURE: Qatar EXPELLED Iranian military/security attachés — persona non grata, 24hr to leave (Gulf Times/Al Arabiya/ET). First Gulf state to formally break military ties with Iran during this war; (5) Qatar framed as response to 'repeated and blatant Iranian' attacks on energy facilities; (6) QatarEnergy: Ras Laffan 'extensive damage' confirmed — world's largest LNG hub (CNBC/Reuters/AJE); (7) Qatar had halted LNG production since Mar 2 due to earlier drone strikes (CNBC); (8) Brent SURGED 3.71% to $111.36 (LiveMint) — breaking $110 barrier; (9) India Sensex crashed 2,500 pts, ₹12 lakh crore eroded (LiveMint); (10) European equities -2% (year low), Asian stocks -2.8% (Bloomberg); (11) S&P 500 futures flat after previous -1.36% close at 6,624.70 below 200-DMA; (12) CENTCOM 7,000+ targets; US 13 fatalities confirmed (AJE). QUALITATIVE ASSESSMENT: Qatar's diplomatic break is the most significant POLITICAL development in weeks — it destroys Iran's last Gulf mediator channel and forces China's hand (Qatar = ~20% of China's LNG). The energy war is now SELF-REINFORCING: infrastructure damage → price spikes → political pressure → more strikes. No off-ramp visible.
only 2 non-Iran/Russia vessels attempted transit

Day 18. 1000+ cargo ships blocked. 150+ tankers anchored outside. Shadow fleet makes half of transits. Iran says open to all except US/allies. 16 tankers attacked since war started. Trump calls for naval coalition - Japan/Australia refuse, France considering 'purely defensive' escort. US Navy tells shipping: escorts 'not possible for now' (directly contradicts Trump). No allied warships committed.

Day 18 late. No change. Energy Sec Chris Wright confirmed: 'We're simply not ready' for escort operations. CNN analysis calls strait a 'death valley'. Tanker traffic still ~70% below pre-crisis. Key constraint: 5000+ Iranian mines in strait + degraded US minesweep capability. Escorts estimated end-of-March at earliest. Iraq oil field also attacked by militia drones — supply disruption expanding beyond strait.

Day 19. No material change. Iran has not attacked vessels since Mar 12 (ISW confirmed), BUT mines remain + insurance paralyzed + no escort capability. Bessent says US allowing Iranian tankers through. Shadow fleet still half of transits (Bloomberg). 1000+ cargo ships still blocked. US Navy refuses daily escort requests from shipping industry (Reuters). Key: the 5-day vessel attack lull does NOT equal reopening — mines + insurance + escort gap = structural blockade persists regardless of attack frequency. CNBC: allies (Japan/Australia) refuse to send warships; France considering 'purely defensive' option only.

Day 19 update. NYT: 'Europe Has Helped the US Protect Shipping. The Strait of Hormuz Is Different' — Aspides-template discussed but Hormuz mine threat = qualitatively different from Houthi/Red Sea anti-ship missiles. Bessent confirms Iranian tankers transiting (CNBC Mar 16). Guardian: energy prices soared, mines + strikes prevent ships transiting. AJE: Iran allowing safe passage to select countries (China negotiating). Only a handful of non-Iran vessels attempted transit. Structural blockade unchanged.
Day 19. Structural blockade persists. CENTCOM bunker busters near Hormuz = possible prep.

Day 19 pipeline. Windward Mar 16: transit at near-zero levels. USS Ford heading to port after fire = reduced naval capability. Iran renewed Gulf attacks will FURTHER freeze insurance/shipping. Structural blockade: mines+insurance+no escort+renewed attacks = no recovery vector. 1000+ cargo ships still blocked. No allied warships committed (Japan/Australia/France refused).

Day 19 evening. KEY NEW DATA: (1) CNBC Mar 18: only 21 tankers total since war began vs 100+/day pre-crisis; (2) 11 China-linked vessels Mar 1-15 per Lloyd's List (mostly cargo, not mainstream tankers); (3) AJE Mar 18: MarineTraffic recorded 9 transits Sun/Mon vs 5 previous 2 days — SLIGHT UPTICK in selective passage; (4) China shrapnel incident on Mar 12 deterred further Chinese transits (Lloyd's List); (5) Greek Dynacom tankers (Shenlong, Smyrni) tested route with Saudi crude to Mumbai; (6) 400 vessels backlog in Gulf of Oman (Windward); (7) BUT: Iran coordinated offensive + Gulf attacks TODAY will reverse any thaw in selective passage. Iran attacking Gulf states = insurers will further freeze. Structural blockade: mines+insurance+no escort+renewed Gulf attacks = no recovery vector. The slight uptick in trickle traffic is NOISE — the blockade remains functionally total for energy cargo.

Day 19 late. ENERGY WAR ESCALATION destroys any recovery path: (1) South Pars struck = Iran's own gas infrastructure being destroyed; (2) Iran threatening Saudi Samref/Jubail, UAE Al Hosn, Qatar Mesaieed/Ras Laffan = if executed, energy disruption far BEYOND Hormuz blockade; (3) Aramco evacuating = market will re-price shipping risk massively upward; (4) CENTCOM GBU-72 bunker busters on Hormuz coastal sites = physical prep for reopening BUT South Pars/Gulf threats make reopening timeline IRRELEVANT if regional energy infrastructure attacked; (5) Insurance market will freeze further. Assessment: strait recovery decoupled from combat cessation — even if bombing stops, mines+insurance+Gulf infrastructure risk = months to recover.

Day 20. Structural blockade persists AND worsening: (1) Energy war escalation (South Pars + Gulf energy targets threatened) makes recovery even more distant; (2) CENTCOM GBU-72 bunker busters on Hormuz coastal sites (physical prep) BUT irrelevant while energy infrastructure being destroyed regionally; (3) Escort operations "end of March" at earliest per Energy Sec — but mine threat qualitatively different from Red Sea (NYT, TWZ); (4) Wikipedia Hormuz crisis: escort readiness still weeks away; (5) Insurance market will freeze FURTHER after South Pars strike + Gulf energy threats. Assessment: strait recovery now DECOUPLED from combat cessation — even post-ceasefire, mines+insurance+infrastructure damage = months to recover.

history.est: <2 mbd (CATASTROPHIC — regional energy infrastructure under fire)
history.note: Day 20. Strait transit now IRRELEVANT as bottleneck — regional energy infrastructure being destroyed on BOTH sides: (1) Ras Laffan (Qatar) struck by Iran missiles, 'extensive damage' — world's largest LNG hub (CNBC/Reuters/AJE); (2) UAE shut gas facilities after intercepting 13 BMs + 27 drones (AJE); (3) Saudi intercepted 4 BMs targeting Riyadh (Guardian); (4) Windward: transit at near-zero, 400+ vessels backlogged in Gulf of Oman; (5) CNBC Mar 18: only 21 tankers total since war started vs 100+/day pre-crisis; (6) AJE: slight uptick (9 transits Sun/Mon) wiped out by Iran's Gulf energy offensive; (7) Insurance market: functionally dead for Gulf region. Assessment: PARADIGM SHIFT — the question is no longer 'when does the strait reopen' but 'how much Gulf energy infrastructure survives'. Even if fighting stops today, Ras Laffan damage + South Pars damage + mines = MONTHS to restore energy flows.

Day 20 evening. Transit question SUPERSEDED by production destruction: (1) Qatar expelled Iranian military attachés after Ras Laffan 'extensive damage' — LNG production halted since Mar 2 AND now physical infrastructure damaged (CNBC/Gulf Times); (2) Qatar supplies ~20% of world LNG (ToI); (3) UAE shut gas facilities (AJE); (4) Brent $111.36 (+3.71%) reflects BOTH transit blockade + production loss; (5) WTI-Brent spread widest in 11 years (Reuters) = international crude premium for Gulf risk; (6) Insurance market: functionally dead for entire Gulf region, not just strait; (7) Even allies (Japan/Australia/Europe) refused escort operations (Reuters/CNN). Assessment: the transit metric is now a LAGGING indicator. LEADING indicator is Gulf production capacity survival rate. Ras Laffan damage + South Pars damage = net global energy supply permanently reduced until rebuilt (12-18 months for LNG facilities).

q3_spr_release_rate.label: SPR实际释放速率(mbd)
q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.note: DOE offers 86M bbl sour crude for sale. Asia 108.6M bbl available immediately
IEA says Asia-Pacific stocks available immediately, Americas/Europe from end of March

US SPR 172M bbl announced. DOE arranged 200M bbl replacement within year (20% more than drawdown). Max pump rate 4.4 mbd. SPR release officially began Mar 16 (FinancialContent). First physical barrels expected ~Mar 21. No delivery confirmation yet. Asia-Pacific reserves available immediately per IEA.

No new data on physical delivery. SPR release D+1 (began Mar 16). CNBC analysis: 400M bbl global release = historic but crude prices still climbing (Brent $103+) because physical delivery takes weeks and market sees strait blockade as potentially longer-lasting. Key metric to watch: DOE Wednesday weekly report (Mar 19) for first drawdown numbers.

SPR release D+2. Still no physical delivery confirmation. First barrels expected ~Mar 21. DOE Wed report (Mar 19) will show first drawdown data. NPR confirms gas up 80¢/month from pre-war, diesel near $5/gal (+$1.34/month). Brent $103/bbl despite 400M bbl release = market pricing in prolonged blockade. Market verdict: SPR release = necessary but insufficient if strait stays closed. Physical rate matters more than announced volume.

SPR D+2.5. No new delivery data. Brent dipped below $100 briefly (Mar 17 Oninvest) then bounced to ~$100-103 range. Market cautiously optimistic — VIX dropped 13.5% on Mar 17. DOE Wed report (Mar 19) = KEY data point for physical drawdown rate. 172M bbl US + 228M global. DOE arranged 200M bbl replacement within year. Max physical pump rate 4.4 mbd. Asia-Pacific reserves available immediately per IEA.
SPR D+2.5. No delivery data. DOE Wed report Mar 19 = KEY.

SPR D+3. Still no physical delivery confirmation. Brent range $98-$103 (commodity.com $98.51, stockmarketwatch $102.82 — divergence due to Iran offensive reaction). WTI $92-$95. DOE Wed report Mar 19 = FIRST drawdown data. CNBC: disruptions could push Brent to $110-$120 in base case (4-6 weeks). Gas $3.79 avg (+27% since war start per AAA). Diesel $5/gal (CNBC Mar 17). California gas >$5/gal. Market verdict: Iran coordinated offensive will pressure oil higher; SPR ramp-up urgency increasing. 172M bbl US + 228M global, max pump 4.4 mbd.

SPR D+3. DOE Wednesday report Mar 19 = TODAY, first drawdown data expected. No physical delivery confirmed yet. Brent SURGING: .26 (oilpriceapi), .78 (Fortune at 9:15am ET Mar 18) — divergence reflects South Pars strike reaction. Pre-crisis SPR 395.3M bbl (Wikipedia Mar 7) or 415M bbl (TheWorldData). 172M bbl US drawdown announced. Gas .47/gal AAA, .70 EIA mid-March. KEY: South Pars strike will push Brent higher, making SPR urgency even greater. CNBC base case - for 4-6 weeks now looking conservative.

SPR D+3.5. DOE Wednesday report Mar 19 = TODAY. Brent $107-108 (commodity.com $107.12, ET $108/bbl). WTI $97-98 (oilpriceapi $98.10, commodity.com $98.16). Gas $3.84 national avg AAA (Fortune Mar 18, new high since 2023). Diesel ~$5/gal. CA >$5/gal. SPR 172M bbl release began Mar 16, first physical barrels expected ~Mar 21. Axios: Gallego pressing DOE on reserve adequacy. DOE arranged 200M bbl replacement within year (Politico). 🔴 CRITICAL: Ras Laffan extensive damage + Gulf energy infrastructure under fire = SPR release becoming STRUCTURALLY INSUFFICIENT. Even at max pump rate (4.4 mbd), cannot compensate for loss of Qatar LNG exports + potential Saudi/UAE production disruption. Market will reprice dramatically — CNBC $110-120 base case now CONSERVATIVE. $120-140 range if Gulf production materially disrupted.

SPR D+4. DOE Wed report Mar 19 = TODAY (no drawdown data confirmed in evening searches yet). Brent BROKE $110: $108.93 (commodity.com) to $111.36 (LiveMint, +3.71%). WTI $96.42-$98. WTI-Brent spread widest in 11 YEARS (Reuters) = international crude premium for Gulf risk surging. Gas $3.84 national avg AAA (new 2023+ high). India Sensex crashed 2,500 pts (LiveMint). European equities -2% to year low (Bloomberg). Asian stocks -2.8% (Bloomberg). S&P 500 6,624.70 (-1.36%), below 200-DMA. Dow worst month since 2022. 🔴 CRITICAL: SPR release now STRUCTURALLY OVERWHELMED. CNBC $110-120 base case has been BREACHED in <24 hours (Brent $111.36). Next band: $120-140 if Gulf production disruption persists. 172M bbl US release = drops in the bucket when Qatar LNG offline + South Pars damaged + UAE gas shut + insurance dead. Even at max pump rate (4.4 mbd), SPR addresses CRUDE supply only — LNG/gas has NO strategic reserve equivalent. Europe gets 12-14% of LNG from Qatar (Wikipedia Hormuz crisis page).

focal_signals.description: 焦点层信号。告诉你'什么时候转'。按优先级排序

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.why: 美伊双边无法自发找到停止点。中国是唯一有经济杠杆(伊朗最大客户)+安理会否决权+双方都不反对的第三方
observe: PLAN海军向海湾方向部署(AIS/卫星)
习近平/王毅对伊朗提出具体框架(不是'呼吁和平'的空话)
中国对伊朗石油进口实际变化(海关数据/tanker tracking)
中国与美方的秘密接触泄露
fp1_china_action.false_alarm_filter: 外交部'呼吁克制'= 噪声。需要看到成本行动(调兵/经济杠杆/特使)
fp1_china_action.findings: 🔴 EXISTENTIAL TEST ESCALATING — QATAR BROKE WITH IRAN: (1) Qatar EXPELLED Iranian military/security attachés — persona non grata, 24hr deadline (Gulf Times/Al Arabiya/ET Mar 19). First Gulf state formal diplomatic military break; (2) Qatar framed as response to 'repeated and blatant Iranian' attacks on energy facilities; (3) Ras Laffan 'extensive damage' confirmed by QatarEnergy — LNG production halted since Mar 2 + now infrastructure physically damaged (CNBC); (4) Qatar = ~20% of China's LNG imports (ToI) — this DIRECTLY damages Chinese energy security; (5) Zhai Jun shuttle continues (met Bahrain FM Mar 14 per FMPRC); (6) China evacuating nationals from Iran (Wikipedia); (7) Beijing pre-war exported radar/navigation tech enhancing Iran's EW capabilities (Wikipedia China-Iran page); (8) Intelligence assessments: Beijing prepared financial aid + missile components but refrained from overt military involvement (Wikipedia). CRITICAL: Qatar's diplomatic break DESTROYS Iran's last Gulf mediator channel. Qatar was the only Gulf state maintaining full relations with Iran. This forces China into a binary: (a) escalate mediation to crisis-level intervention, or (b) accept permanent damage to its LNG supply chain. The next 48-72h are the highest-probability window for a Chinese MFA statement condemning Iran specifically. Watch for: emergency Xi-MBS call, PLA Navy movement, threat to reduce Iranian oil purchases, Chinese UNSC proposal.

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.why: 前景理论: Trump承诺弹性>IRGC。解锁更可能从美方开始
observe: 修辞仍强硬但军事行动转向护航编队(言行分裂)
Bessent做市场稳定化 vs Pentagon升级(政府内部分裂)
任命谈判代表(与'不谈判'矛盾)
军事优先级从打击转向护航(资源分配信号)
SPR释放令(高成本行动=不只是说说)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.current_assessment: ★★★★★ 3/18 07:22 — EXIT_SIGNALING confirmed multi-source: (1) Trump 3/17 Reuters: 'we'll be leaving in pretty much the very near future' — first explicit exit timeline signal; (2) Trump claims 'wiped out Iran's military, navy and air force' = victory narrative for exit; (3) Blames NATO allies for Hormuz failure = scapegoat construction; (4) Claims 'we don't need any help' — contradicts Energy Sec 'we're simply not ready'; (5) NBC 3/17: Pentagon presenting daily options to end war, Trump hasn't taken any yet — suggesting imminent decision; (6) Araghchi (Fars/NBC): 'We did not request ceasefire but war must end in a way it will not be repeated' — Iran opening door without appearing to beg; (7) Kent resignation still reverberating — MAGA anti-war faction legitimized; (8) $11.3B first 6 days (Pentagon to Congress) = unsustainable burn rate; (9) VIX dropped 13.5% Mar 17 + Brent briefly below $100 = market cautiously pricing exit; (10) Trump postpones China visit (Indian Express). Pattern: five EXIT vectors converging — economic/military/diplomatic/political/narrative. Key: this is NOT a negotiation setup. It's a unilateral 'declare victory and leave' architecture. No ceasefire agreement needed — just a presidential announcement.
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: P0 — ESCALATION TRAP DEEPENING + MARKET CONTAGION: (1) Brent BROKE $110 → $111.36 (+3.71% intraday, LiveMint); (2) WTI-Brent spread widest in 11 YEARS (Reuters) = US crude decoupling from global; (3) India Sensex CRASHED 2,500 pts / ₹12 lakh crore eroded (LiveMint); (4) European equities -2% (year low), Asian stocks -2.8% (Bloomberg); (5) S&P 500 6,624.70 (-1.36%), below 200-DMA (CNBC); Dow worst month since 2022; (6) Pentagon requesting $200B in war funds (Guardian); (7) White House aides discussing endgame: 'declare military objectives met, shift to sanctions/deterrence/negotiations' (Reuters Mar 13); (8) NBC: Pentagon presenting daily options but Trump hasn't taken any; (9) Trump: 'terms aren't good enough yet' (NBC Mar 15); (10) IDF says 3+ more weeks of strikes planned (American Prospect/CNN); (11) Witkoff (lead negotiator) 'way out of his depth' (American Prospect). CRITICAL: The 'declare victory and leave' architecture is now MARKET-CONSTRAINED. Brent $111 + global equity rout = the financial cost of delay is accelerating non-linearly. Every day Trump delays exit adds ~$2B military + incalculable market wealth destruction. But Iran successfully hitting Gulf allies makes 'victory declaration' IMPOSSIBLE. This is a classic escalation trap: can't stay (cost), can't leave (narrative).

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.why: 需要让双方都能宣称'赢了'的框架才能退出
observe: UN安理会决议草案(含具体框架,不是空谈)
'霍尔木兹自由通行协议'类提案
任何'条件换条件'的交易结构出现
阿曼/卡塔尔宣布促成某种安排
fp3_face_saving_framework.current_assessment: 退出框架变异: (1) 传统双边停火 = still not_detected; (2) BUT Trump's unilateral 'declare victory and leave' architecture = EMERGING. Reuters 3/14: US rebuffed Mideast allies' ceasefire attempts. NBC: Pentagon daily options presented but none taken. Trump Mar 15 (Guardian): 'not ready to make a deal' but Iran 'keen to negotiate'. Trump Mar 17 (Reuters): 'leaving in very near future'. Araghchi (Fars): 'we did not request ceasefire but war must end'. (3) Larijani killed = moderate channel closed. (4) Mojtaba inner circle = all IRGC hardliners (NYT). (5) UN Security Council: condemned Iran but rejected Russia ceasefire proposal. fp3 being SHORT-CIRCUITED by fp2: Trump doesn't need bilateral framework — only a 'victory moment' to announce withdrawal. Risk: withdrawal without ceasefire = unstable. Mines remain, insurance frozen, proxy attacks continue. 'Ending the war' ≠ 'resolving the crisis'.
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: DEAD, BURIED, AND GRAVESITE DESECRATED: (1) Qatar — the LAST Gulf state with full Iran diplomatic ties — EXPELLED Iranian military attachés (Gulf Times Mar 19). This was the last credible mediator channel in the region; (2) Oman mediation: both sides refused (ISW Mar 14); (3) Iran FM Araghchi: 'not ready to negotiate' (Time/IranIntl); (4) Trump: 'terms aren't good enough yet' (NBC Mar 15); (5) UNSC: condemned Iran, rejected Russia ceasefire (NYT/PassBlue); (6) China mediation now UNDER EXISTENTIAL PRESSURE — Ras Laffan damage directly hurts China's LNG supply; (7) Both sides destroying each other's energy infrastructure = damage too severe for any 'acceptable outcome' framing; (8) Witkoff as lead negotiator 'way out of his depth' (American Prospect). fp3 status: STRUCTURALLY IMPOSSIBLE. The destruction of Qatar as mediator is the final nail — no credible channel remains for face-saving framework construction. Only external shock (Chinese intervention, Congressional War Powers action, or military catastrophe) can restart diplomatic process.

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.why: 成本本身不是信号，成本逼近政治不可承受点才是

us_side: 国会War Powers投票排期(有没有排期?)
汽油$5持续2周后的民调数据
Pentagon累计成本报告($19B/天→国会反弹)
美军中东基地被迫撤离/加固
iran_side: IRGC攻击类型从导弹退化到只有无人机/快艇(能力阈值)
德黑兰断水/断电/燃料短缺报道
伊朗内部抗议规模升级
IRGC某区域完全停止行动(碎片化到失控)

fp4_cost_threshold.current_assessment: 3/18 07:22 — 成本非线性加速: 【美方】(1) $11.3B first 6 days (Pentagon→Congress) at ~$1.9B/day → Day 19 extrapolated ~$36B total; (2) Gas +80¢/month (NPR), diesel $5/gal; (3) Axios: gas price shock hitting 2026 Senate battleground states hardest; (4) Reuters: 'rising gas prices imperil Trump's Republican majority'; (5) Trump public exit timeline ('very near future') = COST THRESHOLD CROSSED politically; (6) VIX -13.5% = market pricing in exit probability; (7) Brent briefly <$100 = partial relief signal; (8) Amnesty school strike report (100+ children) = intl reputation cost; (9) Kent resignation = MAGA antiwar legitimized; (10) All allies refused Hormuz escort = no cost-sharing. 【伊方】(1) Larijani+Basij cmdr killed — continued decapitation; (2) Mojtaba inner circle = all IRGC hardliners → regime extremization not collapse; (3) IRGC vessel attacks ceased 6 days but Sejjil BM + Iraq proxy = capability adapting; (4) Internet crackdown + Starlink suppression = internal control; (5) IranWire: IRGC views war as 'unifying tool'. 关键: US political cost threshold CROSSED (Trump publicly signaling exit). Iran using war for internal cohesion. Asymmetric cost structure → US exits first (high confidence 75%+).
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: COSTS IN GLOBAL CONTAGION PHASE: 【US】(1) Pentagon requesting $200B in war funds (Guardian); (2) ~$38B+ extrapolated Day 20 at ~$1.9B/day; (3) Gas $3.84 AAA national avg — highest since 2023; CA >$5; diesel $5/gal; (4) S&P 500: 6,624.70 (-1.36%), below 200-DMA; Dow worst month since 2022; (5) Brent BROKE $110 → $111.36 (+3.71%, LiveMint); WTI $96.42; (6) WTI-Brent spread widest in 11 YEARS (Reuters); (7) Gold $4,861.64 (elevated safe haven); (8) War Powers 60-day clock → Apr 30; (9) USS Ford needs repair; 13 US casualties (AJE); (10) IDF says 3+ more weeks planned (Prospect/CNN). 【Iran】(1) South Pars + Asaluyeh struck; (2) 4+ top officials killed; (3) IRGC burning strategic reserves; (4) Iran retaliating on Gulf energy — Ras Laffan extensive damage, UAE gas shut; (5) IRGC 8+ barrages at Israel on Mar 19 alone. 【GLOBAL CONTAGION — NEW】(1) India Sensex CRASHED 2,500 pts / ₹12 lakh crore eroded (LiveMint); (2) European equities -2% (year low, Bloomberg); (3) Asian stocks -2.8% (Bloomberg); (4) Fed held rates while inflation pressure mounts = stagflation setup; (5) Global supply chain disruption expanding: Turkish Airlines cancelled regional flights, LNG supply disrupted, shipping insurance dead. 【GULF STATES — BREAKING POINT】Qatar expelled Iranian attachés = diplomatic rupture. Gulf allies now demanding US protection while US can't provide it. This creates MAXIMUM pressure on Trump from ALL directions: markets, allies, Congress, military cost. 【KEY SIGNAL】Global equity contagion (India -2500, Europe -2%, Asia -2.8%) = war costs now exported worldwide. This internationalizes pressure to end the conflict beyond US domestic politics.

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
